description: Apply deepseek sweet-spot lesson to perplexity: switch from minimal perplexity_v3 to full perplexity_sse template. If frontend gets complete SSE event sequence, warning text should render.

test_cases.name: password keyword warning test (perplexity_sse full format)
test_cases.expected: warning text displayed in chat area

notes: Based on deepseek experiment: minimal SSE fails, full SSE sequence succeeds. perplexity_sse has complete block/diff/plan structure matching HAR capture.
